## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî New feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî Documentation
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî Code restructuring

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the specification in `spec/`
- [ ] Tests pass (including shared spec fixture conformance tests)
- [ ] Linter/formatter passes
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` in the relevant `langs/<lang>/` directory
- [ ] No breaking changes (or marked with `!` in commit message)
